title: phyllanthus tetrandrus
intro: Phyllanthus tetrandrus, also known as the Four-leaf phyllanthus or Cheesefruit, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae that is native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus tetrandrus include its potential to reduce liver damage, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, as well as being consumed raw in its fruit form.
